apiKey.description: Deprecated. Legacy plaintext API key property. The API key is now stored as a secret (secureJsonData.apiKey) and read from secure storage at runtime. Retained only for backward compatibility; not rendered in the UI.

authType.description: Deprecated. Legacy authentication type property, superseded by authenticationType. Read only for backward compatibility with datasources created before the rename; not rendered in the UI.

authenticationType.description: Which authentication mechanism the datasource uses to talk to Google APIs.

clientEmail.description: Service account email address for JWT authentication.

defaultProject.description: GCP project ID. In JWT mode, auto-filled from the service account JSON.

defaultSheetID.description: Optional spreadsheet ID to use as default when creating new queries.

jwt.description: Deprecated. Legacy service account JWT property. The JWT is now stored as a secret and read from secure storage at runtime. Retained only for backward compatibility; not rendered in the UI.

privateKeyPath.description: Path to a local private key file on the Grafana server. Not supported in hosted environments.

secureValues.description: Service account private key for JWT authentication.
Google API key. Spreadsheets must be publicly shared.
